all.en: The IT Department will roll out our new project management software next month.
all.zh: 資訊部將於下個月正式導入新的專案管理軟體。

all.en: The new system, called PlanWise Pro, will replace our current platform.
all.zh: 新系統名為 PlanWise Pro，將取代目前使用的平台。

all.en: All employees who manage tasks or projects must complete the training.
all.zh: 所有負責管理任務或專案的員工皆須完成本訓練。

all.en: Training sessions will be held during the first two weeks of June.
all.zh: 訓練課程將於六月的前兩週舉行。

all.en: Each session lasts approximately ninety minutes and includes a live demonstration.
all.zh: 每場課程約九十分鐘，包含現場示範。

all.en: Sessions will be offered both in person and through video conference.
all.zh: 課程將同時提供實體與視訊會議兩種方式。

all.en: In-person training will be held in conference room B on the fourth floor.
all.zh: 實體訓練將於四樓 B 會議室舉行。

all.en: Virtual sessions can be accessed using the link in the calendar invitations.
all.zh: 視訊課程可透過行事曆邀請中的連結加入。

all.en: The training will cover dashboards, task assignments, and time tracking.
all.zh: 課程內容涵蓋儀表板、任務指派與工時追蹤。

all.en: We will also review how to generate weekly status reports.
all.zh: 我們也將說明如何產出每週進度報告。

all.en: A short hands-on exercise will be included at the end of each session.
all.zh: 每場課程結尾將安排簡短的實作練習。

all.en: Participants are encouraged to bring a laptop for the exercises.
all.zh: 建議學員自備筆電以便進行實作練習。

all.en: Login credentials will be sent to your work email two days before training.
all.zh: 登入帳密將於訓練前兩天寄至您的公司信箱。

all.en: Quick reference guides are available on the IT support page.
all.zh: 快速參考手冊已上架於 IT 支援頁面。

all.en: A help desk will be staffed during the first month after the launch.
all.zh: 上線後的第一個月將設置專屬服務窗口。

all.en: Common questions and tips will be added to the internal FAQ regularly.
all.zh: 常見問題與使用秘訣將定期更新至內部 FAQ。

all.en: Existing project data will be migrated to PlanWise Pro on May 30.
all.zh: 現有專案資料將於 5 月 30 日轉移至 PlanWise Pro。

all.en: Please ensure all open projects are updated by May 28.
all.zh: 請於 5 月 28 日前確認所有進行中的專案資料已更新。

all.en: The legacy system will remain in read-only mode for two months after migration.
all.zh: 舊系統將於轉移後維持唯讀模式兩個月。

all.en: Department managers should designate one super user from each team.
all.zh: 各部門主管應指派每組一名超級使用者。

all.en: Super users will receive additional advanced training on June 18.
all.zh: 超級使用者將於 6 月 18 日接受額外的進階訓練。

all.en: Feedback on the new system can be submitted through the IT portal.
all.zh: 對新系統的意見回饋可透過 IT 入口網站提交。

all.en: We appreciate your cooperation during this important upgrade.
all.zh: 感謝各位在此次重要升級期間的配合。

all.en: Please direct any questions to the training team at planwise@company.com.
all.zh: 如有任何問題，請寄至訓練團隊：planwise@company.com。

all.en: Mobile applications for iOS and Android will be made available after the initial rollout.
all.zh: iOS 與 Android 行動應用程式將於首階段導入後開放使用。

all.en: Single sign-on integration ensures employees can access the system with company credentials.
all.zh: 單一登入整合可讓員工以公司帳號直接存取系統。

all.en: All existing user permissions and project roles will be carefully mapped to the new structure.
all.zh: 現有的使用者權限與專案角色將仔細對應至新架構。

all.en: Custom report templates can be created and shared across departments after launch.
all.zh: 上線後可建立並跨部門共享自訂報表範本。

all.en: Integration with our existing communication tools is scheduled for the second phase.
all.zh: 與現有溝通工具的整合預計於第二階段完成。

all.en: A dedicated change management consultant will be on site during the launch week.
all.zh: 上線當週將有專屬變革管理顧問進駐現場。

all.en: Department-specific training sessions can be requested through your local manager.
all.zh: 如需部門客製化訓練，可透過所屬主管提出申請。

all.en: Recorded training videos will remain accessible on the learning portal indefinitely.
all.zh: 訓練影片錄影將永久保存於學習平台供隨時查閱。

all.en: Monthly user group meetings will be held to share best practices and feedback.
all.zh: 每月將舉行使用者社群會議，分享最佳實務與意見回饋。

all.en: We expect this transition to significantly improve our project delivery efficiency.
all.zh: 我們預期此次轉換將顯著提升專案交付效率。

all.en: Office hours with the IT team will be available every Thursday afternoon for one month.
all.zh: 上線後一個月內，IT 團隊將於每週四下午提供諮詢時段。

all.en: Detailed user guides have been translated into five languages to support global teams.
all.zh: 詳細使用手冊已翻譯成五種語言以支援全球團隊。

all.en: Automated email notifications can be customized to match your personal preferences.
all.zh: 自動電子郵件通知可依個人偏好客製化設定。

all.en: Project archives older than three years will be exported and stored on secure servers.
all.zh: 三年以上的專案歷史紀錄將匯出並存放於安全伺服器。

all.en: A short adoption survey will be sent six weeks after the system goes live.
all.zh: 系統上線六週後將發送簡短的導入調查問卷。

all.en: Top suggestions from users will be reviewed by the system steering committee each month.
all.zh: 使用者提出的優先建議將由系統指導委員會每月審議。

all.en: Performance dashboards will help managers monitor portfolio health at a glance.
all.zh: 績效儀表板將協助主管一目了然地掌握專案組合健康度。

all.en: All temporary contractors will receive limited access during their assignment period.
all.zh: 所有臨時約聘人員於任務期間將獲得受限的存取權限。

all.en: Backup procedures have been thoroughly tested to safeguard project data continuity.
all.zh: 備份程序已經過完整測試以確保專案資料的連續性。

all.en: We thank everyone in advance for embracing this important change to our workflow.
all.zh: 預先感謝各位接納這項對工作流程的重要變革。

all.en: My team groaned when we heard about another system migration, but PlanWise Pro is honestly much friendlier.
all.zh: 我們團隊一聽到又要換系統就哀嚎，但 PlanWise Pro 老實說真的好用多了。

all.en: I missed the first training session because of a dentist appointment and ended up watching the recording at midnight.
all.zh: 我因為看牙醫錯過第一場訓練，後來在半夜把錄影看完。

all.en: Have you ever clicked the wrong button during migration and panicked that you deleted three months of work?
all.zh: 你有沒有試過資料轉移時按錯按鈕，緊張到以為自己刪掉了三個月的工作成果？

all.en: My boss volunteered me as the super user, and now everyone in my row asks me whenever something breaks.
all.zh: 我老闆自作主張把我選為超級使用者，現在我這排只要系統出狀況大家都來問我。

all.en: Honestly, the old system was painful, but I still felt nostalgic when they finally switched off the lights last Friday.
all.zh: 老實說舊系統很難用，但他們上週五真的關掉時，我居然還有點懷舊。

all.en: I bought a new monitor specifically so I could see all the dashboard widgets without constantly scrolling sideways.
all.zh: 我特別買了新螢幕，這樣儀表板的所有元件都看得到，不用一直左右捲動。

all.en: My colleague keeps sending me screenshots asking how to assign tasks, even though we attended the same training session.
all.zh: 我同事一直傳截圖問我怎麼指派任務，明明我們上的是同一場訓練。

all.en: The mobile app saved me when I had to update a project status from the airport gate last Sunday evening.
all.zh: 上週日傍晚我在登機門那邊要更新專案狀態，行動應用程式真的救了我。

all.en: My team lead set up custom dashboards for each of us, and somehow mine ended up purple and pink for fun.
all.zh: 我們組長幫每個人都設定了客製化儀表板，不知怎麼我的最後變成紫色配粉紅色。

all.en: Just a tip: turn off email notifications on weekends, or you will get pinged every time a teammate updates anything.
all.zh: 小提醒：週末記得關掉郵件通知，不然同事每改一點東西你都會被通知到崩潰。
